original_hypothesis.title: Bridge Watchdog Can Indefinitely Freeze User Funds via Message Suspension Without Escape Mechanism
original_hypothesis.hypothesis_description: The bridge_watchdog can suspend any message by setting proofReceipt[msgHash].receivedAt = type(uint64).max via suspendMessages. Suspended messages cannot be processed because block.timestamp will never reach invocationDelay + type(uint64).max. There is no timeout mechanism, no user-initiated escape, and no governance override for suspended messages. A malicious or compromised watchdog can freeze all in-flight bridge messages and their associated funds indefinitely.
original_hypothesis.investigation_rationale: The suspension mechanism lacks a time-bounded recovery path. While the owner can unsuspend messages, if the watchdog key is compromised and the owner is a timelock, the delay in governance response could result in extended fund freezing.

proof_of_signal.pattern: receivedAt = type(uint64).max blocks processing; no timeout or user escape mechanism

preconditions: bridge_watchdog key is compromised or malicious

initial_code_evidence.vulnerable_pattern: suspendMessages sets receivedAt=type(uint64).max; invocationDelay + type(uint64).max is unreachable; no escape mechanism
initial_code_evidence.specific_concern: No time-bounded release for suspended messages; no user-initiated override
initial_code_evidence.missing_safeguards: No suspension timeout; no governance override path; no user escape

analysis_questions: What is the governance response time to unsuspend messages?
Can the bridge owner directly unsuspend without the watchdog?
How many messages could be affected by a mass suspension?
validation_requirements: Verify suspended messages cannot be processed or recalled
Assess total value at risk from mass suspension

original_hypothesis.preliminary_attack_scenario: Compromised watchdog suspends all pending message hashes. Users cannot process or recall their messages. Funds locked in bridge and vaults until owner (likely timelock) can unsuspend, which may take days.

potential_impact_if_confirmed.financial_impact: Temporary freeze of all in-flight bridge funds; potentially millions in TVL
potential_impact_if_confirmed.affected_users: All users with pending bridge messages
potential_impact_if_confirmed.recovery_possibility: Possible via owner unsuspend, but delayed by governance timelock

original_hypothesis.test_coverage_gap: No test for mass suspension impact and recovery path

technical_investigation_focus.execution_timing: Instant suspension; recovery depends on governance speed

validation_result.impact_summary: Filtered before validation: attack_realism is LOW
validation_result.detailed_analysis: This hypothesis was auto-rejected because its attack_realism grade is LOW. Preconditions require actions outside the attacker's control (off-chain compromise, victim cooperation, or admin collusion). No LLM validation was performed.
